description: CompositionGreen hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a hood with drawstrings and mesh inner lining, full sleeves with Celtics badge on the chest in mesh and embroidery, ribbed cuffs and hem, NBA badge on the left hem, and zippered pockets on the waistFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this hooded sweatshirt from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants and sports shoes for a sporty look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
